name: meta-chief-of-staff-agent
description: Governed portfolio-level Chief of Staff agent built with the OpenAI Agents SDK.

scripts.phase2: npm run validate && npm run policy:check && npm run test:phase2
scripts.phase3: npm run validate && npm run policy:check && npm run packet:demo && npm run test:phase2 && npm run test:phase3
scripts.phase4: npm run validate && npm run procurement:demo && npm run test:phase2 && npm run test:phase3 && npm run test:phase4
scripts.verify: npm run phase4 && npm run typecheck && npm run sdk:smoke
